title: aechmea comata var. makoyana
intro: Aechmea comata var. makoyana, also known as Makoyana's Aechmea, is a rare species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, native to Brazil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Aechmea comata var. makoyana is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be crushed and applied topically to aid in wound healing.
